method.description: Historical backfill generated from currently collected scored items using published_at dates.
method.warning: This is a backfill based on available collected RSS results. It is suitable for initializing the dashboard, but it is not a complete historical archive.

metrics.overall: Threat Index calculated from the rolling window ending on each displayed date.
metrics.daily_activity: Daily Activity Index calculated only from items published on each displayed date.
